name: Pranav Sarmukaddam
role: B.E. Computer Science (2023-2027) | AI/ML | Product Engineering
headline: Turning Bold AI Ideas into Real-World Impact.
summary: Third-year CSE student at MES Wadia College of Engineering, Pune, focused on AI/ML and product engineering. SIH 2025 Finalist and creator of CritiqAI, an end-to-end ML model auditing platform. Interested in responsible AI, assistive technology, and gamified learning.
about: I build full-stack and AI-driven products that combine strong modeling with user-friendly interfaces. My experience spans ML pipelines, deep learning systems, and interactive applications, with an emphasis on measurable outcomes, explainability, and production readiness.

highlights.title: SIH 2025 Finalist
highlights.detail: Built and pitched an AI-powered product in a high-competition national hackathon environment.

highlights.title: End-to-End Product Builder
highlights.detail: From model training to API integration and frontend UX, experienced with complete delivery cycles.

highlights.title: Responsible AI Focus
highlights.detail: Work emphasizes fairness, explainability, model robustness, and practical adoption.

projects.title: CritiqAI - ML Model Auditing Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack platform that runs 8-stage autonomous audits on uploaded ML models and datasets, covering data quality, fairness, explainability, robustness, uncertainty, drift, and adversarial checks. Generates branded PDF reports with interactive visual analytics.

projects.title: Agricultural AI System - SIH 2025 Finalist
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered crop advisory platform selected as SIH'25 finalist. Trained deep learning pipelines with ResNet50 transfer learning and integrated real-time weather inputs via Open-Meteo API for context-aware recommendations.

projects.title: WinkWire - Blink-Controlled Virtual Keyboard
projects.description: Created assistive-tech software for hands-free typing using blink interaction. Implemented real-time blink detection with MediaPipe + OpenCV and classified single and double blinks for keyboard navigation and selection.

projects.title: Healthcare Prediction System
projects.description: Built an interactive diabetes risk assessment application on the PIMA dataset using Logistic Regression with robust preprocessing and visual evaluation through confusion matrix analytics.

experience.title: Game Developer Intern & Gamification Expert | FireBirdVR
experience.details: Built gameplay systems for immersive VR experiences and designed end-to-end gamified learning journeys for corporate clients with measurable engagement outcomes.

experience.title: Machine Learning Intern | OutriX
experience.details: Developed production-ready ML pipelines for diabetes, student performance, and house price prediction with rigorous evaluation using classification and regression metrics.

experience.title: Academic Support Volunteer | Make a Difference (MAD)
experience.details: Mentored underprivileged children by creating tailored lesson plans and teaching aids aligned to individual learning needs.

experience.title: Head of Department - Physics | Nakshatra Astronomy Club
experience.details: Led physics workshops and STEM outreach initiatives, helping drive a 40% increase in member engagement.

services.title: AI/ML Prototyping
services.detail: Rapid MVP development for predictive models, recommendation systems, and intelligent workflows.

services.title: Model Evaluation & Audit
services.detail: Performance diagnostics, explainability checks, bias review, and production-readiness reporting.

services.title: Full-Stack Integration
services.detail: Deploy models as APIs and build clean dashboards or apps for real users and stakeholders.
